name: Meeting Topic Suggester
highlights: Offers smart title suggestions from AI artifacts right inside Rename.
description: Extracts meeting themes from AI outputs and turns them into clean, ready-to-use titles. Pick one suggestion, tweak it if needed, and save.
howto: Open Meetings and click Rename on any meeting tile.
Pick one of the suggested topics or type your own title.
Save to apply the new meeting title.
